text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
How's this? What if we pass out boba tea made
with Nambu kettles?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's a... novel... approach, but would it really
help promote Morioka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promoting Morioka... They must be talking about
the Traveling Morioka Festival from the other
day. Yukino Bijin said she'd help promote it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Perfect timing. I was thinking of ways
to promote the fest'val, and I'd love to pick your
brain.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout organiz'n one of those "flash mobs"?
Those are really hip and modern. We'd be the talk
of town!
choice_data_list: It doesn't seem that related to Morioka...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's true... There's gotta be somethin'
more hip...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Say, what if you just drop the idea of
making the promotion flashy?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why not just tell people what you love about
Morioka straight-up instead of trying to stand
out?
choice_data_list: Like how you talked to me at the pop-up shop.
Like how you talked to me at the pop-up shop.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you referr'n to... our talk about sansa
odori?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Some kind of talk steeped in memories, I
presume? That sounds like a good place to start.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: That was someth'n... Speak'n of wax'n nostalgic... Aha!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When I was in elementary school, I played the
taiko drums for the sansa odori at a local fest'val!
It was strapped to my chest and I'd hit it while I
walked.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Its way hard'r than y'might think! Botch up the
drumm'n, and the dance goes out of whack!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I think I can relate. It's hard not to be nervous
when your actions impact everyone around you.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Exactamundo. So, when I was down in the dumps
one time after mess'n up, my taiko teach'r came
up to me, and... hehehe. Guess what she said?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: She said it's okay to mess up!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
She reminded me that sansa is the same musical
phrase repeat'n over and over as we walk a long
way.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And that means n'matter how many times y'mess
up, you can always fix it next time. As long as you
had fun and are smil'n when you're finished...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Then all's well that ends well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. I dig it. Like, be yourself and don't try to
put on a front. That kind of thing.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah... That's right. Just be myself.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's gotta be it! The thing I love about Morioka
is... just being able t'be your plain ol' self and
smile!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now there's a good look for you. Tell the
customers exactly that.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I see! But how can I get that across?
choice_data_list: Have them experience it for themselves!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Experience it for themselves, huh... Oh, in that
case!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I pass by the dance studio to
see Yukino Bijin practicing the taiko drums while
Gold City dances along.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! So that was the sound of a taiko drum! ♪ What kind of dance are you doing? I wanna try too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Golly! If it isn't Curren! Here, lemme show you the
steps!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: One, two, one, two! That's it! You're doin' great!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-all right! If I play the taiko drums just like this
on the day of th'event, I bet I'll bring in cust'mers
by the dozen!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A video?! Right! That way we can promote
Morioka to people all ov'r th'world!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sounds pretty good. Leave the filming to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Welcome to the Trav'lin
Morioka Fest'val! Now, everyone sansa odori!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Gold City films Yukino Bijin dancing and
chatting away as natural as can be. A few days
later...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yes, fam! Sansaaaa! Sakkora choiwaaa?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yasseeeee! ☆ That's what's up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The sansa odori is such a cute dance! I've gotta
upload a video of myself dancing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Yukino. I saw your Umatok video! It got a
huge number of views, eh? Thanks to you, the
fest'val looks like it's gonna be a big hit!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank goodn'ss! I'm just glad t'help! Good luck
with the main event! Fing'rs cross'd!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin's dance video is a viral sensation
and, because of that, the Traveling Morioka
Festival ends up a huge success.
